introSection: Chenille (French for Caterpillar) is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently located at Papéa Parc in Yvré-l'Evêque, Pays de la Loire, France.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride features a large house which the train goes through twice. The track is painted pink and the supports are green.

fullText:
Chenille (French for Caterpillar) is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently located at Papéa Parc in Yvré-l'Evêque, Pays de la Loire, France.

The ride features a large house which the train goes through twice. The track is painted pink and the supports are green.
